meaning: n.宽度,宽广,广博,有一定宽度的东西(如一快布料等) /n.宽/高比
examples: The terrace runs the full width of the house.
The road was reduced to 18 ft in width by adding parking bays.
Yesterday we got the height and width, today it's the full wireframe model with scale measurements.
And the width of the chamber looks like it could fit a football field.
